title: 有馬記念の後に・ずっと、ずーっと

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I... I...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I got first place! I really won!

text_block_list.name: Loud Cheers
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whoa! They're so loud!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Haru Urara did it! She finally did it! Sob...

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Urara! Sob... Congratulatiooons!

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Hic... Hic... You were amazing, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Happy Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Sob... Sob... I'm so happy!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Is everyone... crying? Oh no! Why?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
They're so happy they're crying? No! That's not
right!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You gotta smile, everyone! I want you to be
happy!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to make people smile. So, please smile
for me!

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Urara...

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Heh, she's right. This is Urara's happy day. We
gotta smile for her!

text_block_list.name: Happy Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Sniff... Urara... Congratulations! Congraaatulations!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's more like it! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Urara, congratulations! I'm a little sad, but I'm
glad you won!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can't believe the day has come when I lose to Urara.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You sound so nonchalant, but your eyes
look awful red.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm not listening! I'm nooot listening!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Everyone... Heehee, thanks for the
congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I got to race you all. Usually I only
ever see your backs!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I must have gotten stronger, huh? Heehee...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It sure feels good to get first place! This is even
better than I dreamed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara has finally raced on the stage of her
dreams!
